key_findings: Text vs structured: text-only F2=0.3606, structured-only F2=0.4266

multicollinearity.conclusion: No multicollinearity concerns. All numeric VIF < 5, all categorical Cramers V < 0.3.
mitigations: OHE drop=first avoids dummy variable trap
L1 regularisation handles correlated TF-IDF features
Verified low VIF across all numeric features
